title: The Raid
writer: Sydney Boehm, Francis M. Cockrell, Herbert Ravenel Sass
actors: Van Heflin, Anne Bancroft, Richard Boone
plot: A group of Confederate prisoners escape to Canada and plan to rob the banks and set fire to the small town of Saint Albans, Vermont. To get the lay of the land, their leader spends a few days in the town and finds he is getting dr...
